source_pr.title: test: stablize test case
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:
Try to stablize test case `TestOptimisticConflicts`. Testing failed like [link](https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_check_2/detail/tidb_ghpr_check_2/66257/pipeline).

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:
Increase the pessimistic lock `managedLockTTL` so that resolve lock timeout will occur before lock expire.

How it Works:

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

-  No release note.
